languages.text: "Преступница ворвалась во время смены караула, взорвала фраг-гранату и начала отстреливаться. Мы отрезали эту сволочь от выхода, но ей удалость взять заложника. Снайперу нужно время, чтобы занять позицию, но разговаривать она согласилась только с вами. Пострадал персонал сектора Бионика". {n}Взгляд Иокасты на секунду соскальзывает под ноги блюстителей, на смятое взрывом тело {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} Ферренца. Ударная волна почти отделила его тело от собственных {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендритов{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Преступница ворвалась во время смены караула, взорвала фраг-гранату и начала отстреливаться. Мы отрезали эту сволочь от выхода, но ей удалость взять заложника. Снайперу нужно время, чтобы занять позицию, но разговаривать она согласилась только с вами. Пострадал персонал сектора Бионика". {n}Взгляд Иокасты на секунду соскальзывает под ноги блюстителей, на смятое взрывом тело {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} Ферренца. Ударная волна почти отделила его тело от собственных {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}механодендритов{/g}.{/n}
traits.speaker: MasterofDiscipline

languages.text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started firing on everyone. We blocked her escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. She is only willing to talk to you, and the sniper needs time to get into position. Sector Bionica staff have been injured." {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz, lying on the deck by the enforcers' feet. His body has been crushed and his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} have nearly been severed from him by the shockwave.{/n}

Пострадал персонал сектора Бионика". {n}Взгляд Иокасты на секунду соскальзывает под ноги блюстителей, на смятое взрывом тело {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} Ферренца. languages.text: 「犯人は警備員が交代する間に侵入し、手榴弾を爆発させ、全員を射撃した。彼女の逃走経路を塞いだものの、その卑劣な女は人質を連れて逃げた。彼女はあなたしか話さないと言っている。狙撃手は狙撃位置に就くのに時間がかかる。バイオニカのスタッフが負傷した。」{n}サウアーバックは一瞬、警備員たちの足元で倒れているジェネトール・フェレンツを見つめた。彼の体は衝撃波で潰され、メカデンドライトはほぼ切断されていた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard shift, detonated a frag grenade, and started firing on everyone. We blocked her escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. She is only willing to talk to you, and the sniper needs time to get into position. Sector Bionica staff have been injured." {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to Genetor Ferrenz, lying on the deck by the enforcers' feet. His body has been crushed and his mechadendrites have nearly been severed from him by the shockwave.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「犯人は警備員が交代する間に侵入し、手榴弾を爆発させ、全員を射撃した。彼女の逃走経路を塞いだものの、その卑劣な女は人質を連れて逃げた。彼女はあなたしか話さないと言っている。狙撃手は狙撃位置に就くのに時間がかかる。バイオニカのスタッフが負傷した。」{n}サウアーバックは一瞬、警備員たちの足元で倒れているジェネトール・フェレンツを見つめた。彼の体は衝撃波で潰され、メカデンドライトはほぼ切断されていた。{/n}

languages.text: "Fail; nöbet değişimi sırasında içeri girmiş, parça tesirli bomba atmış ve herkese ateş etmeye başlamış. Kaçış yolunu kapattık ama pislik, birini rehine almayı başardı. Sadece sizinle konuşmak istiyor. Keskin nişancının da pozisyon alması için zamana ihtiyacı var. Sektör Biyonika personeli yaralandı." {n}Sauerback'in bakışları, bir anlığına infazcıların ayaklarının dibindeki güvertede yatan {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g} Ferrenz'e kayıyor. Vücudu ezilmiş ve {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritleri{/g}, şok dalgasıyla ondan neredeyse kopmuş.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started firing on everyone. We blocked her escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. She is only willing to talk to you, and the sniper needs time to get into position. Sector Bionica staff have been injured." {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz, lying on the deck by the enforcers' feet. His body has been crushed and his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} have nearly been severed from him by the shockwave.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Fail; nöbet değişimi sırasında içeri girmiş, parça tesirli bomba atmış ve herkese ateş etmeye başlamış. Kaçış yolunu kapattık ama pislik, birini rehine almayı başardı. Sadece sizinle konuşmak istiyor. Keskin nişancının da pozisyon alması için zamana ihtiyacı var. Sektör Biyonika personeli yaralandı." {n}Sauerback'in bakışları, bir anlığına infazcıların ayaklarının dibindeki güvertede yatan Genetör Ferrenz'e kayıyor. Vücudu ezilmiş ve mekadentritleri, şok dalgasıyla ondan neredeyse kopmuş.{/n}

languages.text: «La criminal se coló durante el cambio de guardia, detonó una granada frag y abrió fuego contra todo el mundo. Bloqueamos su ruta de escape, pero la miserable ha conseguido hacerse con un rehén. Solo está dispuesta a hablar con usted, y el francotirador necesita tiempo para colocarse en posición. Hay personal del Sector Bionica herido». {n}La mirada de Sauerback pasa momentáneamente al {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz, a los pies de los guardias. La onda expansiva ha aplastado su cuerpo y casi le ha arrancado las {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started firing on everyone. We blocked her escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. She is only willing to talk to you, and the sniper needs time to get into position. Sector Bionica staff have been injured." {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz, lying on the deck by the enforcers' feet. His body has been crushed and his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} have nearly been severed from him by the shockwave.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La criminal se coló durante el cambio de guardia, detonó una granada frag y abrió fuego contra todo el mundo. Bloqueamos su ruta de escape, pero la miserable ha conseguido hacerse con un rehén. Solo está dispuesta a hablar con usted, y el francotirador necesita tiempo para colocarse en posición. Hay personal del Sector Bionica herido». {n}La mirada de Sauerback pasa momentáneamente al Genetor Ferrenz, a los pies de los guardias. La onda expansiva ha aplastado su cuerpo y casi le ha arrancado las mecadendritas.{/n}

languages.text: “行凶者趁换岗间隙闯入，引爆了一枚破片手雷，然后见人就开火。我们封锁了她的退路，但这人渣劫持了一名人质，她只肯和您谈。狙击手就位还需要时间。仿生区职员有伤亡。”{n}苏尔贝克的目光短暂移向躺在执法者脚边的{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}费伦茨。冲击波碾碎了他的身体，{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}也被冲击波震得几乎从身上断裂。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started firing on everyone. We blocked her escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. She is only willing to talk to you, and the sniper needs time to get into position. Sector Bionica staff have been injured." {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz, lying on the deck by the enforcers' feet. His body has been crushed and his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} have nearly been severed from him by the shockwave.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “行凶者趁换岗间隙闯入，引爆了一枚破片手雷，然后见人就开火。我们封锁了她的退路，但这人渣劫持了一名人质，她只肯和您谈。狙击手就位还需要时间。仿生区职员有伤亡。”{n}苏尔贝克的目光短暂移向躺在执法者脚边的基因士费伦茨。冲击波碾碎了他的身体，机械触须也被冲击波震得几乎从身上断裂。{/n}

languages.text: « L'assaillante s'est introduite dans l'infirmerie pendant la relève de la garde et a lancé une grenade à fragmentation avant d'ouvrir le feu sur tout le monde. Nous l'avons empêchée de prendre la fuite, mais cette ordure a réussi à prendre un otage. Elle a déclaré qu'elle n'accepterait de négocier qu'avec vous, et le sniper a besoin de temps pour se mettre en position. Un membre du personnel du secteur Bionica a été blessé. » {n}Le regard de Sauerback se pose brièvement sur le {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} Ferrenz, qui gît sur le pont aux pieds des prévôts. L'explosion a mutilé son corps et presque arraché ses {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started firing on everyone. We blocked her escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. She is only willing to talk to you, and the sniper needs time to get into position. Sector Bionica staff have been injured." {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz, lying on the deck by the enforcers' feet. His body has been crushed and his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} have nearly been severed from him by the shockwave.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « L'assaillante s'est introduite dans l'infirmerie pendant la relève de la garde et a lancé une grenade à fragmentation avant d'ouvrir le feu sur tout le monde. Nous l'avons empêchée de prendre la fuite, mais cette ordure a réussi à prendre un otage. Elle a déclaré qu'elle n'accepterait de négocier qu'avec vous, et le sniper a besoin de temps pour se mettre en position. Un membre du personnel du secteur Bionica a été blessé. » {n}Le regard de Sauerback se pose brièvement sur le genetor Ferrenz, qui gît sur le pont aux pieds des prévôts. L'explosion a mutilé son corps et presque arraché ses mécadendrites.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Täterin ist während des Wachwechsels durchgebrochen, hat eine Splittergranate gezündet und um sich geschossen. Wir haben ihr den Fluchtweg abgeschnitten, aber das Miststück hat eine Geisel. Sie will nur mit Euch sprechen, und der Scharfschütze braucht etwas Zeit, um in Position zu gehen. Es wurden Mitarbeiter des Sektor Bionica verwundet." {n}Sauerback wirft einen kurzen Blick auf {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz, der vor den Enforcern auf dem Boden liegt. Sein Körper ist zerschmettert, und die Druckwelle hätte ihm beinahe die {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g} ausgerissen.{/n}

Es wurden Mitarbeiter des Sektor Bionica verwundet." {n}Sauerback wirft einen kurzen Blick auf Genetor Ferrenz, der vor den Enforcern auf dem Boden liegt. Sein Körper ist zerschmettert, und die Druckwelle hätte ihm beinahe die Mechadendriten ausgerissen.{/n}
